about.intro.title: WHO IS ABG?
about.intro.label: THE CODES // NOT A CORPORATION
about.chapter1.title: 01 / THE FLIP: ACOUSTIC BUT GOATED
about.chapter1.text1: Asian Baby Girl? Nah. For us, it’s Acoustic But Goated. Right now, students walking around Samyan are basically forced into an NPC uniform—standard faculty jerseys or the exact same mass-produced tees as everyone else. So we built ABG.
about.chapter1.text2: We are creating the unofficial 'Samyan Baddie' uniform. Effortless everyday wear, but injected with bold, limited-run aesthetics. We're not a corporation, just university students who got tired of the bookstore merch.
about.chapter2.title: 02 / THE CRASH SITE: SAMYAN SANDBOX
about.chapter2.text1: Most campus merch feels like a lazy bookstore cash grab printed on cheap cardboard blanks. It has zero energy. We wanted something that actually documents our late-night study sessions, midterm crying sessions, and street food runs.
about.chapter2.text2: ABG is deeply embedded in Samyan culture. Raw concrete shophouses, street food vendors, and tech-hubs. We designed these pieces to survive a hundred runs through the dorm washing machine after a messy night out or a 3 A.M. midterm grind.
about.chapter3.title: 03 / THE OBSESSION: TEXTILE SPECS
about.chapter3.text1: Our obsession is premium construction—utilizing the same heavyweight fabrics as luxury streetwear labels, but without the gatekept price tag.
about.chapter3.text2: We literally fought our suppliers to get the heavyweight GSM cotton and heavy puff-print graphics exactly right. No cheap promotional blanks. Boxy, oversized, and comfortable enough to sleep in, but bold enough for a fit pic.
about.chapter4.title: 04 / THE SYSTEM: FLAWLESS CHECKOUT
about.chapter4.text1: Most indie brand drops are a complete disaster. Crashy websites, manual bank transfers, and absolute chaos trying to get your clothes.
about.chapter4.text2: So we custom-built the backend tech ourselves. No Google Sheets manual validation, no server crashes. When a drop goes live, the checkout is flawless, and you actually get your gear without the usual merch-pickup chaos.
about.chapter4.footer: IF YOU ARE READING THIS, YOU'RE PART OF THE SYSTEM. NOW GO SURVIVE MIDTERMS.
product.sizeguide.title: Size Guide
product.sizeguide.content: Standard oversized fits. If you want it extra boxy to hide your midterm stress, go one size up. Full chart coming soon.
product.material.laundry: 100% combed cotton. Wash cold, hang dry, and please don't burn it with a cheap iron.
